Article: Pulp Fiction with the cast of EVA
[]: Pulp Fiction with the cast of EVA             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Fri Jan 01, 2010 6:41 pm Here's how I see it: Vincent Vega- Kaji Jules Winnfield- EVA 01 Ringo (“Pumpkin”)- Ritsuko Yolanda (“Honey Bunny”)- Maya Lance- Pen Pen Butch Coolidge- EVA 02 Marsellus Wallace- Gendo Marvin- Kensuke Brett- Shinji Paul (“Flock of Seagulls”)- Aoba “Seinfield”- Toji Fabienne- Rei Jody- Mari Mia Wallace- Misato Zed- Kaworu Maynard (Pawn Shop Owner)- Hyuga The Gimp- Shinji again Captain Koons- Fuyutsuki Jimmy- Hideaki Anno Please feel to change whatever. (I got despreate casting the EVA's.)

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Fri Jan 01, 2010 7:11 pm reminds me of my thoughts of The Terminator with the cast of EVA, in which Rei's the T-800, Gendo is Kyle Reese, Yui is Sarah Connor, Shinji is John Connor & so on & so on Asuka for the T-X & Mari for Cameron (From "The Sarah Connor Chronicles")

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Fri Jan 01, 2010 7:27 pm GasmaskAvenger wrote: reminds me of my thoughts of The Terminator with the cast of EVA, in which Rei's the T-800, Gendo is Kyle Reese, Yui is Sarah Connor, Shinji is John Connor & so on & so on Asuka for the T-X & Mari for Cameron (From "The Sarah Connor Chronicles")

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Sat Jan 02, 2010 12:03 am No... I'm pretty sure Asuka is Jules, Shinji is Vincent, and Kaworu is Marvin. *gunshot* Asuka: What the hell was that? Shinji: Aw man, I shot Kaworu in the face. Asuka: Ante baka ? Why on earth did you do that? Shinji: I didn't mean to... I just... the gun went off on its own... Asuka: Well you know we have to get off the road now

Article: Pulp Fiction with the cast of EVA
 Asuka: Ante baka ? Why on earth did you do that? Shinji: I didn't mean to... I just... the gun went off on its own... Asuka: Well you know we have to get off the road now or we're toast. Shinji: Let the police arrest me... he was worthy of living and I'm not. Asuka: Baka Shinji! *slap*
